candidate.description: Compressing high-dimensional embeddings into discrete codebook indices (product quantization, scalar quantization) to reduce memory for similarity search.

l2s.scope_1line: Split vector into subspaces, quantize each with its own codebook.
Approximate nearest-neighbor indexes: HNSW, IVF, LSH.

l1s.scope_1line: Reducing feature count via projection or quantization.
Unsupervised grouping of points by similarity.
